meta.homeTitle: Access0x1 — a do-it-all center to get you and your business onchain
meta.homeDescription: Access0x1 is the open, on-chain layer for payments, auth, and agents. Accept USD-priced payments in USDC with one link, prove identity with ENS, and let agents act within scoped grants — zero custody, no contract code. Live on Arc, Base, and zkSync, powered by Chainlink.

hero.eyebrow: One link · no code · no contract · no gas — apps build on it
hero.headline: The open-source rail for onchain identity + USD-priced payments in USDC
hero.subhead: Access0x1 is the open umbrella layer apps build on — the shared, on-chain rail for accepting USD-priced payments in USDC, proving identity, and letting agents act on your behalf. Onboard once, share a link, get paid in USDC — zero custody, no smart-contract code to write.

cta.primary: Get started — no cost to join

features.heading: One center, the whole commerce stack
features.sub: A full suite of open-source contracts behind a single link. Turn on only what you need — every piece shares the same no-custody settlement spine.

payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Get paid in USDC with one link. A Chainlink-interface price feed quotes the USD price inside the pay transaction; funds settle merchant-to-payout with zero custody.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: Recurring on-chain billing that renews itself — a permissionless Chainlink Automation keeper charges due plans, never holding a balance.

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.description: Take reservations and paid appointments on-chain, with the deposit collected through the same no-custody settlement path.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.description: Issue and settle invoices in USDC — track receivables on-chain and let a customer pay a request with a single link.

giftCards.title: Gift cards
giftCards.description: Mint, redeem, and reload stored-value gift cards as on-chain balances your customers can spend across your storefront.

agents.title: Agents · SessionGrant
agents.description: Delegate scoped, time-boxed spending to an agent or session key — a signed grant lets software pay on your behalf within limits you set.

ens.title: ENS identity
ens.description: Pay a verified human-readable name instead of a hex address. Checkout resolves and proves the merchant’s ENS name before a cent moves.

landing.closingHeading: Get onchain in under two minutes
landing.closingBody: No code, no contract to deploy, no gas to manage. Set your name, share your link, get paid in USDC.
